title: eleocharis abnorma
intro: Eleocharis abnorma, also known as abnormal spike-rush, is a type of flowering plant in the sedge family (Cyperaceae). It is primarily used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Eleocharis abnorma is often used in teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
